title: LITTLE FREE PANTRY - 211info
text: LIVING WATER FELLOWSHIP LITTLE FREE PANTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an outdoor mini food pantry with shelf-stable food items and personal care items; specific items vary and are not guaranteed. 1000 N Main Avenue Suite 12 Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours (503) 842-6455 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 842-6455 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Visit website for complete list of requested donation items. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Tillamook County Services: Food Donation Programs Food Pantries Personal/Grooming Supplies Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - MANY HANDS MEDICAL EQUIPMENT MUTUAL SUPPORT - EMBRACE GRACE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
